description: From the manufacturer Olympia D693 Harley Dessert Knife (Pack of 12) Dessert knives are great for use with cakes or afternoon tea; the rounded tip on this dessert knife makes it perfect for use with soft desserts and cheeses. Featuring crisp, straight lines with an uncomplicated design, the dessert knife is both comfortable to hold and will suit any informal table setting. As the cutlery is pressed from solid 18/0 stainless steel, it has magnetic qualities, meaning it can be used with magnetic cutlery saving bin lids.
